svg.title: Operations notes module
svg.desc: **Module.** Where staff enter report-facing occupancy/request wording and reservation-level notes that feed operational reporting and printed documents.

g.text: Reservation #10427 · Victoria Cottage · Arrives Jun 26 · Operations Notes
2 guests · request quiet room, late tea time
Extra cot in upstairs room · firewood stocked
Welcome back! Same cabin as last summer.
